case_for: Cousins has shown boom potential this season, including a 34.4-point outburst and three other games above the threshold, suggesting he can still deliver big fantasy weeks when things click.
case_against: The steep drop in pregame projection (7.2 pts) compared to his recent scoring average signals a tougher matchup or diminished role, and his last two games (12.5, 7.2) show a declining trend that aligns with that lower outlook.
